name: Alex Okpisz
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Alex became interested in the real estate profession because of his first duplex purchased for his family home and for an investment. This interest has now grown to an over 30 year career in real estate.

In addition to his real estate career, Alex has a second career in microprocessor design with Intel Corporation. As a result of his technical career, most of Alex’s real estate clientele has come from the engineering community, who can appreciate his thoroughness and attention to detail. This second career was responsible for bringing Alex to Austin.

After completing an eight-month internship at IBM, Alex returned to school to receive his Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering at University of California at Davis. He then left the San Francisco Bay area and has enjoyed Austin with his family since 1992.

Alex hobbies include restoring air-cooled Volkswagen cars and collecting Lego. He is a member of the Grace Community Church in Georgetown.

As a dedicated real estate professional, I understand that a home is more than just a place to live; it’s where life unfolds. With over seven years of experience in the industry, I have helped numerous clients navigate the buying and selling process, ensuring a smooth experience every time. I am proud to hold my real estate license and am fluent in Spanish, demonstrating my commitment to excellence. I tailor my strategies to meet your unique needs, whether you are buying your first home or selling a property. What sets me apart is my personalized approach and my dedication to building lasting relationships based on trust. I am here to guide you through every step, providing insights and support. name: Angie Jones
title: COMMERCIAL SPECIALIST
bio_html:
Angie Jones, Texas Accredited Commercial Specialist

Broker Associate | Horizon Realty | Austin, Texas

Angie Jones is a Texas Accredited Commercial Specialist and seasoned Real Estate Advisor with nearly a decade of hands-on experience in commercial real estate. Since 2013, she has built a reputation as a skilled negotiator and trusted advocate for both buyers and tenants throughout Central Texas. Angie thrives on the dynamic nature of each deal— analyzing business demographics, market trends, and traffic patterns to strategically position her clients in the heart of their ideal customer base.

Her work spans all four major sectors of commercial real estate—industrial, retail, office, and land acquisition or disposition—and she represents clients in both sales and leasing transactions. Known for her collaborative approach, Angie is passionate about creating win-win scenarios where landlords and tenants alike achieve lasting success.

As a top producer at Horizon Realty, Angie attributes her success to prioritizing her clients’ goals, listening intently, and understanding their needs at every step. Outside of real estate, Angie is an avid traveler, scuba diver, and lifelong learner—currently studying Italian and always exploring new ways to grow personally and professionally.

name: Austen Fulmer
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
I’m Austen Fulmer, I’m a Realtor and Contractor. I own 512 Remodel and our specialty is taking a home that’s about to go on the market, identifying the most value added improvements and completing the work to add the most value to the seller. This usually means spending as little money as possible while maximizing your sale price. We sit down, I provide a free comprehensive plan that includes pricing on any improvements I recommend and a full selling strategy. We call it our Peak Selling Condition Assessment. 512 Remodel can take care all of this in house from planning to closing. At a minimum, I’ll help you understand how to get the most for your home.

title: Sales Associate
bio_html: Buying or selling a home is one of the most significant investments you’ll make, and I’m here to ensure it’s a smooth and rewarding experience. My real estate practice is founded on the principles of patience, problem-solving, and organization, always prioritizing your best interests without any pressure. In my first year alone, I hosted over 60 open houses, demonstrating my dedication and expertise. With 7 real estate certifications, I provide comprehensive support throughout your buying or selling journey. I leverage innovative marketing techniques to give your property maximum exposure and achieve record-time sales. As a certified property tax consultant and Texas notary, I bring additional value to every transaction. My commitment to community involvement, including volunteering and providing monthly snack donations to students in need, reflects my dedication to making a positive impact. With a 5-star Google rating, you can trust me to help you achieve your real estate goals with professionalism and care.

bio_html:
Brad Folk is a dedicated REALTOR® who seamlessly blends his entrepreneurial success and business management expertise with his passion for real estate. Guided by the principle that a client-centered approach is the foundation of a thriving business, Brad approaches every transaction—whether buying, selling, or investing—with care, precision, and a steadfast commitment to excellence.

 

Understanding that real estate decisions can be deeply personal and, at times, overwhelming, Brad provides a steady and knowledgeable presence. His ability to connect with people from all walks of life, coupled with his exceptional communication and negotiation skills, ensures that his clients feel supported, understood, and confident throughout the entire process.

As a long-time resident of Austin, Brad is deeply familiar with the city’s unique neighborhoods, culture, and opportunities. He recognizes the challenges of relocating and is passionate about helping clients transition seamlessly into life in this vibrant community. Whether you’re exploring Austin for the first time or are a seasoned local considering your next move, Brad is here to guide you every step of the way.

Reach out to Brad today for expert advice and personalized service tailored to your real estate goals. Your journey to finding the perfect home begins here.

name: Brooks Wilmoth
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Brooks is a real estate agent in the Austin, Texas market whose main focus is the client journey and differentiating himself in the marketplace. He began his career out of a passion for real estate and helping his clients achieve their personal and financial goals. His core values include faith, family, impacting others, and fitness. Brooks saw an opportunity to provide a one-of-a-kind service and experience to his clients and decided to begin his journey in Real Estate.

At a young age, he was dedicated to the sport of swimming. He went on to compete at the collegiate level at the University of Louisville where he won two conference championships and became team captain in his final year at U of L. His professional career began in the IT staffing and services industry connecting companies and organizations with top talent in IT. Both recruiting and account management have given Brooks a unique start to his career. He later went on to become the Director of Business Development for his family’s Oil and Gas Landman brokerage company in west Texas where he impacted their company footprint, developed client relationships, and increased their clients’ overall production and land management. In 2020, Brooks decided that it was time to pursue his passion and take the next step to start his career in Real Estate. As a real estate practitioner, his focus is rooted in developing relationships with his clients, providing a unique streamlined and enjoyable experience, and working with them to achieve their personal and financial goals through real estate.

Brooks enjoys spending as much time as he can with his amazing family that has been supportive and his rock throughout his life. His wife Brittany, his son Graham, and his dog Harvey are his pride and joy. They love spending time outdoors, finding new restaurants, traveling, and spending time with extended family.

name: Christine Choate
title: Broker/Owner
bio_html:
A proud native of Austin and a graduate of the University of Texas at Austin, Christine Choate has built an exceptional career spanning over 32 years in real estate. Her expertise extends across all facets of the industry, from personal investments to brokerage leadership.

Christine has personally bought, sold, constructed, and renovated properties throughout Central Texas, managing over $22 million in personal investment transactions. Her keen eye for opportunities and deep market knowledge have been instrumental in her success.

As the founder and owner of Horizon Realty, Christine has led one of the most respected real estate firms in Central Texas for 26 years. Horizon Realty, home to approximately 100 professional Realtors, has been a trusted partner for buyers, sellers, and investors since 1999. The firm offers comprehensive services, including residential and commercial sales, leasing, and property management, while maintaining strong relationships with title companies, mortgage lenders, inspectors, appraisers, surveyors, and contractors.

Horizon Realty stands out in the industry by offering one of the most competitive commission structures in Central Texas, unparalleled agent support, and a culture that fosters both professional growth and a sense of family. As a result, Horizon Realty has consistently outperformed market standards, generating hundreds of millions of dollars in real estate sales.

Beyond business, Christine is passionate about giving back to the community. Horizon Realty actively supports Coats for Kids, Soles for Souls, The Miracle Foundation, the Capital Area Food Bank, Dress for Success, Toys for Tots, and Austin Pets Alive.

Christine is also a dedicated leader in the real estate industry. She has been an active member of the Women’s Council of Realtors, Real Estate Council of Austin, and Texas Real Estate Political Action Committee. She has served on the Nominating Committee and Governmental Affairs Committee for the Austin Board of Realtors and has shared her expertise through presentations at the Austin Institute of Real Estate, the Austin Board of Realtors, and the University of Texas at Austin.

While continuing to expand her real estate portfolio and lead her brokerage, Christine enjoys spending time with her family, their whippet, and making the most of her newly built pickleball court!

name: Cindy Walsh
title: Sales Associates
bio_html:
In 1981 while visiting a friend in Austin, Thom had a feeling that Austin could be a great place to move his family. The cold harsh winters and rainy springs had taken a toll on his psyche. Looking for a warmer climate, Austin seemed to be the place he could picture his family living. Having been involved in the real estate market in Maine in the capacity of apartment conversions to Condo’s, the real estate business seemed the perfect transition. Over the next year, he made numerous trips to Austin and with each trip enjoying the area more. During one of these trips, Thom went to real estate school, did the required classes and passed the Texas Real Estate exam. Over the next few years trying to work in real estate was difficult due to commuting back and forth from the east coast. In February 1985, Thom made the permanent move to Austin. The market was booming at that time. Little did he know that in the next number of months, the market would collapse. He initially thought it was a temporary slowdown. In September of 1985, Cindy, who had a full time career, took a leave of absence from her company to join Thom. From 1982 to the present, they have experienced at least 7 to 8 market shifts.

In 1986, Cindy resigned from her company in the Northeast where she was a district manager for a clothing company. Not being able to make the income she was accustomed to as a District Manager, she embarked on positions that would allow her to be an involved mom by volunteering in the children’s school starting at elementary and continuing through to college. During this period, Cindy worked at jobs that would help her in her Real Estate career. She worked in residential property management, commercial real estate, and farm and ranch. During the late 80’s, she and Thom were principal owners along with two other investors in a Custom Home Building business where she handled the day to day activities of the business, such as accounts receivable, payables, insurance, contractor bids and various other duties. In 1992, Cindy got her Real Estate license and joined Thom as a partner in residential sales.

Their first six years as partners in real estate, Cindy calls those years their “tight belting years” which has helped them survive the roller coaster ride that has been the Austin Real Estate Market. Survival of those lean years adds to Cindy and Thom’s durability and experience in the market. Through all the ups and downs of the Austin market, Cindy says it has been so worth it. They live in a vibrant and beautiful city that is full of energy and great opportunities. Cindy feels that by living in Austin, it allowed their two children to receive a great education. Daughter Jesse-LaRou Walsh, a Lt. Commander in the U.S. Navy, is presently enrolled in the Master’s program at the Navy College in Monterrey, Calif. Son Jameson Walsh, who also served as an officer in the U.S. Navy, is finishing his Master’s degree at John’s Hopkins University in Bio-Chemistry and is employed by Medimmune Inc., a pharmaceutical company located in Maryland.

After reading this brief bio on Thom and Cindy, you will come to know that as a client of Thom and Cindy’s you will have 50+ years of combined experience working for you. They know that “timing is everything” having experience many market changes over the years. Thom and Cindy know that to have happy satisfied clients, they need to make themselves available to their clients 24/7, and not just Monday – Friday 9 to 5. They feel without their loyal clients, they would not still be in business. Please take the time to visit their website cindyandthomwalsh.com

Cindy and Thom are members of the National Association of Realtors, Texas Association of Realtors, The Austin Board of Realtors and the Austin Multiple Listing Service.

Office: 512.342.1800 
Email: [email protected]
URL:http://www.cindyandthomwalsh.com

name: Edgar Uribe
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Edgar Uribe is a dedicated real estate professional committed to serving the vibrant community of Austin, Texas. With over 14 years of experience in the service sector, including roles in local bars, restaurants, and coffee shops, Edgar has honed invaluable skills in customer service and relationship building. This background seamlessly integrates into his approach as a real estate agent, where his priority is to provide personalized solutions tailored to clients’ needs, all while upholding the highest standards of integrity, ethics, and honesty.

Beyond his real estate endeavors, Edgar is deeply involved in Austin’s cultural scene as a musician and DJ. Additionally, he oversees an audio production company specializing in live events and artist outreach, leveraging his extensive network to offer unique opportunities and connections.

When not immersed in work, Edgar enjoys the tranquility of Commons Ford park with his loyal canine companion, Elon. Cooking and entertaining also bring him joy, as he cherishes moments spent hosting friends and family in the neighborhood home, shared with his partner, Courtney. Residing in Cuernavaca, Edgar has a profound appreciation for Austin’s diverse neighborhoods and the unique lifestyle each offers.

Edgar is also fluent in Spanish, as he is a first-generation Mexican-American, bringing a refreshing cultural dimension to the real estate experience. Whether clients are searching for their dream home or considering selling their property, he brings a professional yet personable approach to every transaction. If you are looking for an agent with passion, drive, and motivation, give Edgar a call today.

name: Fern Garza
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
As Co-Founder of DL Garza- Villarreal Strategies, I drive strategic investments, high-level deal structuring, and transformative growth across the U.S., Mexico, and Latin America. I actively expand my portfolio across multiple businesses, including real estate, biotechnology, AI, cryptocurrency, 3D printing, manufacturing, oxygen chambers, and oil/gas, building partnerships that maximize value and long-term returns.

My career in the public sector began at the U.S. Department of the Treasury and spans work in the Mexican Congress and gubernatorial campaigns, giving me deep expertise in government, policy, and business across both countries. I lead cross-border deals, including data centers and 3D printing operations, while overseeing major real estate developments in Texas, Mexico, and Latin America. As a trusted commercial and residential real estate advisor, I bring added expertise to transactions and developments across hospitality, retail, office, and residential sectors.

With roots in Texas and Mexico, I bring people, capital, and ideas together to strengthen communities, expand opportunity, and build a resilient future.

name: Gregg Sellers
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Gregg Sellers is a native of Atlanta, Georgia and moved to Texas in 1979. He originally obtained his Texas Real Estate license in 1984 and concentrates his efforts in Farm and Ranch sales with residential home sale expertise in Travis Country. Since 2008, Gregg has been one of Austin’s multi-million dollar farm and ranch salespersons with sales in Travis, Williamson and Hays Counties. Gregg is a committed to individual customer service and networks throughout Central Texas to fill his customers’ needs.

A graduate of Southern Methodist University, Gregg works with clients whose needs range from commercial leases and tract housing to luxury homes and exquisite hill country horse and hunting ranches. In his spare time, Gregg works with teens in recovery, raises chickens in his home built coop, gardens, enjoys cooking and rides motorcycles with his wife Kelly. When time permits, Kelly and Gregg travel throughout the United States by car visiting family and friends.

bio_html:
Irma Gonzalez has been a full-time Realtor® since 2013. She has worked and lived in the  Austin & Round Rock Metro for over 25 years. Prior to becoming a Realtor®, Irma obtained a bachelors and masters degree in Accounting from the University of Texas at Austin and practiced as a CPA for over 10 years. After moving 6 times in 20 years, she understands the emotional and financial stress involved in buying, selling, and moving. Irma’s first hand experience allowed her to recognize the financial and emotional impact of having the right Realtor® on your team. Irma brings attention to detail and an analytical frame of mind to her business interactions. She listens to her clients’ goals, explains their options, and helps them attain the best possible outcome. She enjoys building her business by referral through clients, friends, and family who have been delighted working with her due to her exceptional customer service and knowledge.  Irma has invested a significant amount of time in becoming an expert in all phases of the real estate transaction in order to better serve her clients. Her in-depth-training combined with her experience ensures her clients get the best representation and advice. 

Personal Mission Statement
“To help her clients build wealth through homeownership and Real Estate investments.”

Personal

In her free time, she enjoys spending time with her family, traveling, skiing, scuba diving, hiking, and relaxing. name: Kamal Saieh
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Kamal was born and raised in the city of David and the birthplace of Christ in Bethlehem. He came to the US after high school to attend college where he met his wife, Lachelle. Kamal has three boys, Daniel, Austin, and Andrew. He became interested in real estate in 2005 after buying and selling a couple of properties for himself. He obtained his Texas Sales Agent license in 2006 and helped several buyers and sellers since achieve their real estate goals. Kamal holds an M.A. in Communication Studies and excels at negotiating the deal. He believes that the art of negotiating the deal will determine the final outcome of the service he provides. He also believes the foundation of a solid contract that benefits his clients is the key to their end satisfaction. Kamal cares about his clients and focuses his input and advice for their best interest.

Kamal has extensive marketing skills. In addition to utilizing the MLS and open houses, Kamal invests heavily in producing a polished professional video, photos brochures, and a property website profile. He then uses social media and the internet to generate the largest viewership which in turn increases interest and competition for the listed property.

For buyers, Kamal understands several crucial variables that can influence a property’s price, such as timing, property condition, location, current offers, and interest, in which he uses to negotiate the best deal for his buyers. He also strongly believes that every man and women should own at least a homestead. If you are a seller seeking to maximize your return or a buyer wanting to get the best deal and contract terms, then contact Kamal now for a free consultation.

Karen Wong and her family moved to Austin in 1992, and she started her real estate career in 2002.
Karen and her husband Phil have raised three kids and a Border Collie, and her family has been living in Great Hills since 1996.

Karen is a licensed full time real estate agent and earned her designation from the Graduate Real Estate Institute (GRI) in Texas. With over eight years of experience, she has served many families and friends in the Austin metropolitan area including Austin, Westlake, Pflugerville, Round Rock and Cedar Park.

Whether you are looking to sell, buy, lease, manage properties or invest, she will provide you with honest and accurate information to assist you in making a well informed decision. It is her goal to provide you with superior service at all times.

Karen is honest, professional, competent, reliable and pleasant to work with.  Her biggest reward in real estate is to earn your business and referrals. Please call Karen Wong to assist with your real estate needs. If you are looking for someone who goes above and beyond, Karen can also speak fluent Mandarin and Cantonese, which is a big plus in serving American-Chinese in the Chinese community as well.

name: Katie Onken
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Meet Katie O, your Cosmic Realtor, with over two decades of experience igniting transformation of the land and real estate transactions into journeys of abundance, joy, and love.

Having served the vibrant Austin community since 1997, I blend my wisdom from 20+ years in residential and commercial real estate with intuitive and path-clearing coaching skills. This unique fusion allows me to offer a service that’s out of this world!

I bring you the “Cosmic 3 Cs”:
✨Cosmic Connection: We create authentic, compassionate solutions through deep listening, validation and connection.
✨Cosmic Clarity: We discover your moving ‘why, what, and when’ and make timely, financially informed, heart-centered real estate decisions.
✨Cosmic Calm Courage: We approach your real estate journey with confidence and serenity, and you can trust that you’re in the flow.

Outside of real estate, I embark on nature adventures with my spirited daughter and two canine companions. Singing, Yoga, and Meditation are my passions, bringing balance and peace to my life and others.

Let’s manifest your real estate dreams together, one cosmic connection at a time.

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Kelly Jedele
title: Sales Associate
bio_html: Kelly moved to Austin in 1997 for college and stayed because of the amazing city. She owns a residential cleaning company here in Austin and has enjoyed helping clients care for their homes since 2009. Her team is managing and running that business and it just makes sense that if she is helping clients maintain their homes, helping sell or buy their next home seems like a natural fit. She truly enjoys getting to know and work personally with people. Buying and selling your home is a very rewarding and emotional experience and she is here for all the ups and downs and victories of that process!

name: Kenzie LeBlanc
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
I’m an Austin area REALTOR® who genuinely loves helping people find a place that feels like home. Not just something that checks the boxes. I grew up around this area, so Cedar Park, Leander, and North Austin aren’t just places I work, they’re home to me.

I got into real estate because I love the idea of being part of such a big moment in someone’s life. Whether you’re buying your first home, moving up, or starting fresh, I’m here to make sure you feel comfortable, confident, and actually excited through the whole process.

I’m big on communication, staying organized, and keeping things real with my clients. No pressure, no confusion just someone in your corner who truly wants what’s best for you. I’ll celebrate your wins, keep you grounded when things feel overwhelming.

Outside of real estate, I’m usually trying new coffee spots, staying active, spending time with family and at volleyball tournaments and just enjoying everything that makes the Austin area such a fun place to live.

Email: [email protected]

name: Kevan Drake
title: sales associate
bio_html:
Growing up in Austin, I’ve seen it change from the tiny city that nobody knew was the capital of Texas, to the thriving, growing metropolis that it is today.

My family and I love exploring our city in every way possible: finding tasty food, peaceful nature spots, and lovely houses for those looking for a place to call home.

With a background in nonprofit environmental social justice work, I approach real estate with an eye out for sustainable living and connections with the community.

I’m proud to be an agent at Horizon Realty, a local brokerage that puts clients first, and always goes the extra mile to get the job done right. With a Graduate Realtor Institute designation and a team of incredible agents behind me, I love working to find just the right home for my clients and their families.

name: Krista Thompson
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Real estate is about people first, and that belief is at the heart of everything I do! I’m a Central Texas real estate agent serving Austin, and the surrounding communities, and I’ve built my business almost entirely through referrals from past clients and fellow agents. That doesn’t happen by accident, it happens through trust, communication, and genuine relationships.

I take a hands-on, white-glove approach with every client, whether you’re buying your first home, selling a place full of memories, or making a strategic move for your future. I pride myself on being honest, responsive, and proactive, and I believe that great real estate experiences come from listening first and guiding with clarity and confidence.

When I’m not working with clients, you’ll usually find me spending time with my family, cheering on my boys at the baseball field, or staying connected in the communities I serve. My clients often become friends, and my goal is always the same: to make the process feel less stressful, more informed, and truly supported from start to finish!

Email: [email protected]

name: Kristen Scudder
title: Broker Associate
bio_html:
I am a residential Broker Associate with Horizon Realty with over 10 years experience as a licensed Realtor. I provide exceptional service to my clients by listening to their needs and helping people navigate life changes. Change (good or bad) drives the need for my services. It is not enough to just do a “good job” for my clients. That’s kind of like saying you should do a good job as a parent, a good job is the baseline. I treat people the way I want to be treated and to provide a level of expertise and service that is unmatched. Therefore, my philosophy is to serve my clients so well that your home buying or selling experience is enhanced because of my performance.

A little about me, I grew up in the good ol’ 78745 of Austin, Texas. After traveling throughout the United States pursuing my undergraduate and graduate degrees in archaeology I moved back to Austin in 2009 because I just couldn’t stay away. I love Austin! When I am not helping clients, I enjoy preparing for my level three sommelier certification as well as being outdoors, reading books, walking my dogs, Styx and Zoso, spending time with my three cats, The Rat, Chewie and Dr. Loois and cooking foods that reflect mine and my husband Chris’ many around the world travels!

I specialize in first time home buyers, home sales, move up buyers, new construction and downtown condominium sales whether relocating to Austin or already living in Austin and the surrounding areas.

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Laura Gass Weaver
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Laura Gass Weaver joined Horizon Realty in 2016 with over 25 years’ experience in the real estate industry. Through that experience, Laura developed a commitment to excellence in serving client’s needs through active listening and consistent follow-through. She fulfilled roles in project management, quality assurance, and business process design within the areas of commercial development, leasing and management, and residential property investment. Laura studied business with a concentration in computer information systems, earning a Bachelor’s degree with honors. She also holds certifications in contract negotiation, customer service and real estate technology. In her free time, Laura serves on the real estate advisory board for Austin Community College, as area coordinator for her neighborhood association, helps people who are experiencing homelessness, and putters in the garden.

With a combined 50+ years’ experience, Laura and husband, Ray, teamed up to help clients achieve their real estate goals—whether it’s in buying their dream home, right-sizing, or building wealth through real estate investment. Passionate about making the transaction an enjoyable experience, they leverage technology to manage the details and keep communication flowing, facilitate win-win outcomes, and celebrate along the way. Grateful to live in Austin, Texas, USA, they are eager to share their experience with you.

name: Laura Hudson
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
As a native Austinite, Laura Hudson brings unparalleled knowledge and enthusiasm to helping her clients find their dream homes. With a background in professional tennis and pickleball, she understands the importance of dedication, perseverance, and teamwork. These skills combined with her local expertise, ensure a seamless and successful real estate experience for buyers and sellers alike. Let Laura serve as your trusted guide to Austin’s vibrant neighborhoods and hidden gems. Let’s ace the real estate game together!

  • Licensed Realtor 2017
  • Professional Pickleball Player/Tennis Coach
  • Former WTA Tour Player
  • Former Division 1 College Tennis Scholarship

name: Liana Brown
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Born and raised in Austin, Liana Brown has witnessed the tremendous change and growth that has transformed the area. Being an Austin native as well as a local school teacher, she is uniquely qualified to help your family find the perfect home, in a school district that suites your families needs.

As an educator Liana has always enjoyed coming up with a plan for each individual. Children need different strategies —so do home buyers and sellers. These same skills she honed in the classroom enhance her ability to listen and fully understand what her clients are looking for and then educate them through the process.

Liana is a graduate of Texas State University. She was recently married to her husband Brian. She is a fluent French speaker and knows every great queso place in and around Austin!

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Lillian Carrasco
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Hi, I’m Lillian Carrasco, a proud native Texan who’s called Round Rock home since 2000. Having grown up here, I’ve witnessed firsthand the incredible growth and transformation of this community, and it’s one of the many reasons I’m so passionate about helping others find their place in Central Texas.
 
I’ve been a licensed real estate agent since 2023, and I bring both local insight and genuine care to every client I work with. As a Military Relocation Professional (MRP), I’m honored to help service members and their families make smooth transitions, whether buying, selling, or relocating.
 
For the past year, I’ve been living in Killeen, but I’m excited to be moving to Georgetown this year, continuing my journey right here in the heart of Texas.
 
When I’m not working with clients, I’m usually spending time outdoors with my three dogs or exploring all the hidden gems our area has to offer.
 

Email: [email protected]

name: Linda Holmbeck
title: Sales Director
bio_html:
Linda Holmbeck is a fourth-generation Austinite with over a decade of residential real estate experience. She holds a B.A. from the University of Texas at Austin and has been a licensed Realtor since January, 2001. Linda provides her clients with extensive knowledge of the Austin and Central Texas area and she commits the time, expertise and attention needed to help her clients achieve all their real estate goals. Her main objective is to help her clients make the right real estate choices and establish friendships in the process.

Linda is an expert negotiator focusing on buyer’s representation, listing marketing, new construction sales and relocation. She enjoys working with a wide array of clients ranging from first-time home buyers to move-up buyers and retirees, as well as clients relocating or purchasing second homes. Linda is a determined and creative problem solver who is energetic and fun to work with.

Linda is an Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) with specialized training on the unique needs of home buyers. She is also a Certified Residential Specialist (CRS) and a Graduate of the Real Estate Institute (GRI). Linda makes it a priority to focus on your goals, to explain your options and to provide excellent service in order to ensure a positive home buying or selling experience.

Linda is a licensed Realtor with Horizon Realty. In her free time she enjoys walking her dog, Toby, traveling and relaxing with family and friends. Linda’s other hobbies include movies, music, wine-tasting and exploring small Texas towns.

Office: 512.342.1800 
Email: [email protected]

name: Lori McFadden
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Lori was first licensed as a real estate agent in Sacramento, California in 1990, where she worked the residential market for two years. However, she soon became intrigued by the complexities of investing in and developing rural land and took on her first project. Since then, she’s had over twenty years of experience in real estate markets in three states, mainly buying and selling rural properties for investment purposes. More recently, she’s become a licensed Realtor®–first in Texas, then New Mexico—and has enjoyed the real estate opportunities that keep her busy in both states. Lori is also a member of both the national REALTORS® Land Institute (RLI) and the Texas Alliance of Land Brokers (TALB). In central Texas, Lori has enjoyed the challenge of helping relocation clients, and serving the traditional needs of Buyers and Sellers. In order to better serve client needs, she’s a member of three MLS systems: Four Rivers Association of Realtors® (FRAR), Austin Board of Realtors® (ABOR) and San Antonio Board of Realtors® (SABOR). She considers it a real privilege to participate in achieving the goals of her clients, and every transaction is measured in terms of the friendships formed.

Background:
Lori and her husband, Don, grew up and married near Vancouver, Canada, then emigrated to California, where they were blessed with three daughters over the years. In 2004, she graduated summa cum laude, Phi Kappa Phi, with a B.A. in Communications from CA State University, Sacramento. In 2005, their family moved to the Texas Hill Country—for two years in west Austin, then to acreage outside San Marcos. Don (CPA, MBA) retired several years ago from his work as an institutional money manager, and now contributes an unusual mix of business acumen, marketing aptitude, photography/digital media ability and computer skills in order to support Lori’s efforts to meet client needs.

Besides real estate, Lori treasures time to grow in her faith, share her knowledge about alternative health, and spend time with family and friends. Outdoor activities such as biking, kayaking, hiking, hunting and wildlife management work are also high on her list for enjoyment.

name: Mary Kay Ponce
title: NEW AGENT TRAINER
bio_html:
GRI – Graduate of Real Estate Institute

I am one of the fortunate few who have had the opportunity of growing up in Austin Texas. Coming from an educational background I am eager and passionate to keep up with all the changes in real estate, legally, economically and the real estate market trends. This knowledge ultimately benefits my clients

I realize that buying and selling a house is one of the biggest decisions for a client, my representation and guidance is a true privilege I do not take lightly. I am committed to work diligently with my clients through the process which can be daunting in itself, at times. I want this journey to be an enjoyable time for my clients.

I enjoy spending time with my husband and family, reading to expand my knowledge, being outdoors, entertaining, crafting and I’m an active leader in my church. My husband has been in the home building/remodeling business for 40+ years. Having been around this process it has given me a love for homes and how impactful finding the right one for someone else can be.

I look forward to being involved in guiding you to find the right home. Call, text or email and let’s begin this journey today.

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Melanie Anthony
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
As a proud Austin-Area resident for over 30 years, I’ve had a front-row seat to the city’s incredible transformation, from a laid-back college town to one of the nation’s fastest-growing and most dynamic metro areas. Through the highs and lows, from the Dot-com crash of 2000 to the housing downturn of 2008 and the challenges of the 2020 pandemic, one thing has remained true: Austin’s real estate market is resilient, and so are the people who call it home.

Real estate is more than just a transaction, it’s personal. Whether you’re buying or selling, I know this journey can be deeply emotional and financially significant. That’s why I’m committed to being both your fiercest negotiator and your biggest cheerleader. My goal is to make the process not just successful, but meaningful and as stress-free as possible.

My clients often say I go beyond the role of a realtor, they know me as someone who’s loyal, honest, relational, and always in their corner. Many have become lifelong friends, and that’s the heart of what I do: building lasting relationships rooted in trust.

To better serve my clients, I continue to stay educated and informed, earning several professional designations which include:

 – Graduate, REALTOR® Institute (GRI)

– Accredited Buyer Representative (ABR)

– Certified Full-Service Professional (CFSP)

These credentials reflect my commitment to providing expert guidance, next-level service, and a smooth, successful experience for every client.

Originally from Michigan, raised in Colorado, and forever planted in Texas, I landed at TCU on a golf scholarship. Today, I’m a wife, mom to three amazing daughters, avid tennis player, and love pickleball. I’m also the proud schnauzer mom to Boomer, our spirited sidekick. My husband and I own a lumberyard chain, specializing in outdoor living spaces, which keeps us plugged into building trends and adds another layer of insight and value for my clients.

Whether you’re buying your first home, moving up, or downsizing for a new chapter, I would be honored to guide you through the journey. Your goals matter to me, and so does your experience.

Let’s get started, your next chapter is waiting.

She is passionate about helping people find a place to call home and building relationships with her clientele. She spends her free time with her family and friends, traveling, rescuing boxer doggies and playing Pickleball.

name: Michelle Dickerson

bio_html: My name is Michelle Dickerson and I am a long time resident of the Austin area. I am a wife, mother, corgi mom, and a Realtor. In my professional careers, I’ve learned how to incorporate the value of ethics into both relationships and business, how to listen to peoples’ needs, and hone in on my love for helping others. As your Realtor, it’s my goal to be sure that your real estate experience is rewarding. Whether you’re a first time homebuyer, looking to sell, or seeking an upgrade, you can count on my deep understanding of the local market and a team of seasoned professionals surrounding me to help you find the perfect home. And it’s not just about finding a home, it’s about finding a place where memories are made, laughter is shared, and dreams are nurtured. Let’s embark on this journey together! I’m here to guide you each step of the way, answer any questions you may have, and help you make the best decisions for your future. Reach out and let’s get started!

I’ve lived in the Austin area for most of my life, with nearly all of my family members nearby. I attended Texas A&M University, where I played on the Women’s Soccer team while earning a Bachelor’s in Psychology and a Master’s in Sports Management.

After college, I returned to the Austin area and began a career in property management. Over the years, I’ve gained valuable experience as a property manager, which has given me a deep understanding of the local market and real estate trends. This knowledge allows me to provide my clients with the best information to make informed decisions.

I’m passionate about people and ensuring everyone I encounter feels cared for. With my faith and love for others, I strive to make people feel loved, valued, and comfortable placing their trust in me.

On weekends, I enjoy visiting downtown Georgetown, spending time with family, attending church, and staying active. I look forward to the opportunity to work with you!

In Texas’s vibrant and competitive real estate market, standing out truly matters.

As a dedicated real estate professional, I bring a unique, full-service approach that combines decades of experience in real estate, financing, and marketing with a genuine passion for connecting people  to places they’ll call home.

For me, real estate goes beyond transactions, it’s about building relationships, creating opportunities, and helping clients, friends, and neighbors achieve their dreams.

Texas has been my home for over 30 years, and I’m proud to share the incredible communities it has to offer with you. Whether you’re buying, selling, financing, or just simply exploring your options, I’m here to guide you every step of the way.

Loving every moment of the journey and every door I open!

Warmly,

Mindy Sue Bakker
Horizon Realty

name: Mindy Walker
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Growing up in Austin, Mindy has watched it go from a “town” to a major metropolitan powerhouse that still manages to keep its individuality and identity. After graduating from Austin High, she went on to Southwest Texas State, earning an undergraduate degree in Early Childhood Education and a Masters in Elementary Education. After teaching for several years, she took time to raise her own children.

Mindy has always loved architecture and design, so when she decided to re-enter the work force, she began her real estate career in 2012. One of the FIRST questions agents are asked is “What are the schools like?”, Mindy is able to tell you from first hand experience. Her best client relationships have been centered around family and education.

As a professional, she understands you can only be as good as the people you surround yourself with, which is why she’s very proud to be working with one of Austin’s best, Horizon Realty.

name: Miquele Dunkley
title: Sales Director
bio_html:
Born and raised in Austin, I have developed a true love and passion for this city and its people. My husband also grew up in Austin and the two of us cannot imagine a greater place to build a life together with our three children.

I have been a licensed REALTOR in Austin since 2006. My years of experience as a REALTOR have instilled in me a desire to serve my clients with unwavering integrity and professionalism. Prior to my real estate career I spent 4 years in Client Relations learning the incredible value of a committed service relationship. My dedication to long lasting relationships, effective communication skills, and continuous attention to detail will ensure you a professional and enjoyable real estate transaction. My top priority is your satisfaction. I am committed to people and their values, not just the transaction. I promise to make your interests and your needs the basis of helping you make the best real estate decision for you.

There’s no question that buying or selling a home is more than a financial undertaking; it’s also an emotional and life changing event. At times it can seem overwhelming, but it doesn’t have to be. Let me show you just how fun it can be to find your dream home when you’re working with a professional that truly cares about you and your family.

REALTOR®
Top Producer 2013 and 2014
Five Star Award Winner 2016
Certified Negotiations Expert (CNE)
Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR) designation
Certified Luxury Home Marketing Specialist (CLHMS) designation
Graduate of Realtor Institute (GRI) designation
Specialty Buyer’s Representative in New Home Sales
Member of the Austin Board of Realtors
Member of the Texas Association of Realtors
Member of the National Association of Realtors
BS in Communication Studies from the University of Texas at Austin

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Mylah Edwards
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Born in Orlando, Florida, but proud to call Austin home for over 19 years, I’ve grown to love everything this vibrant city and beautiful state have to offer. As a mother of two and a full-time real estate professional, I understand that buying or selling a home isn’t just a transaction—it’s a life-changing experience.

My purpose as a Realtor is simple: to be the solution to all your real estate problems. Whether you’re listing your home or planning your next big move, I’m here to guide you every step of the way with honesty, hustle, and heart. I specialize in listings and take great pride in creating customized marketing strategies that get homes sold quickly and for top dollar.

I’m not just the hardest working Realtor you’ll ever meet, I’m the one who knocks (literally). You might even catch me on your doorstep, proactively seeking out the perfect buyer for your property. I don’t wait for opportunity, I go out and create it.

With my deep roots in Austin and my passion for helping families make confident real estate decisions, I’m committed to making your move smooth, successful, and even enjoyable. At Horizon Realty, your goals become my mission.

Let’s make your next move your best move.

Email: [email protected]

name: Patrice Emrie
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
PROPERTIES BY PATRICE

Patrice is a Realtor® and Senior Real Estate Specialist that approaches work with enthusiasm, creativity and a meticulous attention to detail.  She is a team player who uses her listening skills, strong work ethic, professionalism, negotiation abilities and positive attitude to achieve the required results in the selling and/or buying of one’s home.

Being a University of Texas graduate, and having lived numerous places in the Austin area for over 2 decades, Patrice is knowledgeable of the surrounding areas, local events, and many activities.   Patrice has found that her greatest professional and personal successes is in assembling strong relationships, as she focuses on giving her best in every endeavor to surpass other’s expectations.  Her approach is centered around a “client-first” philosophy to encourage and deliver a sense of deep satisfaction.

When not working with clients and friends, Patrice and her husband enjoy entertaining, cruising the lake, hiking, and traveling to new places to explore and experience new adventures.  Patrice believes in giving back to the community, and she volunteers for many non-profit fundraising arenas including Austin Smiles;  Austin Loaves and Fishes; Crisis Pregnancy Center;  Colton’s Hope; Suicide Awareness & Project SemiColon.   In addition, she supports numerous local art fundraisers and countless music events.

Patrice’s desire and goal is to make the entire real estate process stress free, because having not only lived in Texas and several states, she has also lived in Italy and Canada, and knows from personal experience the pressures that moving can bring.   She finds there is no better measure of success than the happiness and satisfaction to her clients, friends and family.

www.PropertiesByPatrice.com

name: Paul Juarez
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Highlights
  • TDHCA DPA Specialist- it’s for the Texas Home Buyer down payment assistance programs
  • Accredited Buyer Representative (ABR) designation- only 2% of REALTORS have this education
  • Pricing Strategy Advisor (PSA) Certification from NAR
  • Graduate REALTOR Institute (GRI) designation- only 10% of Texas agents have this education.
  • Real Estate Negotiation Expert (RENE) designation
  • Worked for a property management company for 2 yrs. and helped over 100 people rent a new home.
  • Helping people buy and sell homes since 2020
  • Strategies for clients: 21 home searches, 19 to win offers, 12 to revive a stale listing, 9 to overcome challenges in renters’ backgrounds, 32+ step marketing plan, and other strategies for investor searches
  • The Juarez Realty Group is a team/group under Horizon Realty
  • I became the REALTOR I wish I had!

About Paul
I was born in Austin, raised in Odessa, lived in San Antonio for 5 years, Rome, Italy for a year, and now in Austin since 2013. I have my bachelor’s degree in Leadership Studies from the University of Texas of the Permian Basin and nearly completed my master’s degree before transitioning to non-profit work and then real estate.  You’ll often find me playing indoor volleyball, watching a movie, watching improv comedy shows, and exploring more of Austin.

My Promises to Clients
  • Obedience, loyalty, disclosure
  • Confidentiality, accounting, reasonable care
  • Negotiate and Advocate for You
  • I will help you throughout the selling or renting process
  • Information about state and local laws concerning real estate

Follow me on social media to receive news, tips, and more information on the real estate industry and to learn more about me.

name: Penny Rose
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Penny is a conscientious Realtor who exudes integrity, credibility, commitment and determination. Penny has twenty years in real estate after selling in Colorado since 2003. She has worked in all aspects of the residential capacity representing both buyers and sellers including first time home buyers, investors, new construction, condominiums and luxury properties.

She is committed to customer service and hard work, to listen and follow through when dealing with her clients. Her passion for real estate is apparent through her communication skills and a warm and friendly approach. Penny’s prior clients have appreciated the relationships built based on her honesty, patience, positivity, strong attention to detail and ensuring a positive experience for all parties involved in a transaction.

Penny is a graduate of Colorado State University where she met her husband Brad and they have two grown children Alexa and Jackson. In her spare time, she can be found reading, hanging out with her family, going to the gym, playing Pickleball or hanging out at the lake with friends and two crazy but lovable dogs, Sadie and Bentley.

name: Ray Weaver
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Ray Weaver earned a Bachelor of Science degree in management and economics, began his real estate practice in 1996, and joined Horizon Realty in 2008. He earned his broker’s license in 2011. Through his training as a Seniors Real Estate Specialist®, Ray has the knowledge and tools to understand and cater to the unique needs of buyers and sellers over 50. As a Realtor, Ray is a member of the Austin Board and the Texas and National Associations of Realtors.

The first thing you should know about working with Ray is that he is deeply committed to his client’s best interests. He is detail-oriented and pays close attention to all aspects his client’s real estate needs. Ray considers it an honor to serve his clients. Whether you are buying, selling, need assistance with a family member’s housing or with finding service providers, Ray can help. Ray stays abreast of best practices and policies to solve real estate situations—oh, and yes, has some fun along the way.

Office: 512.342.1800
Email: [email protected]

name: Rebekah Kim
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Moving is one of life’s biggest transitions. I’ve done it across countries, across states, and across life seasons, often with three kids in tow! And I know firsthand that it takes more than logistics to feel truly settled. It takes care, vision, and someone who understands both the details and the emotions behind every decision.

Born in Seoul and raised in London, I’ve lived, studied, and worked in some of the world’s most dynamic cities. With a Master’s in Visual Communication and experience leading boutique hotel renovations in Kensington, I developed a love for well designed spaces and thoughtful living. After getting married in California and raising our young family in Brooklyn, we moved to Georgetown, Texas in 2021, drawn by Austin’s natural beauty, creative spirit, and strong sense of community.

I’m a bilingual speaker of English and Korean, and a real estate professional who brings both lived experience and practical insight to every client relationship. I’ve flipped homes, designed rooms from the studs up, and relocated more times than I can count. That journey helps me to see what really matters when people are making big moves.

Whether you’re starting fresh, looking for more space, or preparing for a new season of life, I’m here to guide you with clarity, creativity, and care. I believe in thoughtful communication, honest guidance, and walking alongside my clients to help them feel seen, heard, and fully supported.

It would be a joy and an honor to help you and your family take the next step toward a place that feels like home.

Email: [email protected]

Phone number: (213) 440-1415

name: Richard Foster
title: Sales Director
bio_html:
Proudly hailing from the great state of Texas, I am a 7th Generation Texan and a 5th Generation Austinite, embodying a deep connection to the vibrant culture and dynamic real estate landscape of Austin. With a rich history rooted in this unique city, I bring over 20 years of invaluable experience to the realm of residential real estate.

In the dynamic world of Austin real estate, I stand out as a trusted Realtor/Broker, specializing in residential properties. My approach is marked by a commitment to excellence and a track record that speaks for itself. I have mastered the art of utilizing innovative residential listing strategies, consistently securing my sellers thousands of dollars in profit over their competition. Moreover, my streamlined selling process is designed to circumvent costly repairs and navigate away from unreasonable buyer demands.

When it comes to representing buyers, I am dedicated to securing their dream homes in the desired areas without compromise. I ensure that my clients do not overpay while still meeting their greatest wants and needs in a property. The recurring feedback I receive from my esteemed clients is a testament to my direct, efficient, and results-driven approach. I am known for getting the job done, exceeding expectations, and fostering lasting relationships built on trust and success.

If you are considering entering the Austin real estate market, whether as a seller or buyer, I invite you to connect with me. Let’s engage in a conversation about how my extensive knowhow and strategic insights can be tailored to meet your unique real estate goals. Your journey in the Austin real estate market deserves a seasoned professional, and I am here to ensure your experience is seamless, profitable, and ultimately successful. Shoot me a message, and let’s discuss putting my expertise to work for you.

 

Email: [email protected]

name: Roy Waley
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Central Texas/Austin native with deep experience in Area Real Estate and building history. Not driven to be a top producer but to be the best agent you ever met. Love what I do. Could say all the usual Realtor stuff you read online but contact me instead and see what I can do for you.

Office: 512.342.1800

name: Scott Lawrence
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
© 2025 Horizon Realty. All Rights Reserved

Texas law requires all real estate licensees to display the following | CPN & IABS

name: Slade Crabtree
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Slade is committed to uphold the highest level of integrity, ethics, and honesty while delivering exceptional service. In today’s competitive market, it is highly important to have a reliable real estate agent with superior communication skills that you can trust and depend on to guide you through the home buying or selling process and Slade checks all the boxes. He has held residential investment homes since 1998 and currently owns and manages properties in Austin, Round Rock, and Hutto where he has resided over the past 20 years. Slade’s strong work ethic, high level of dedication, and commitment to protecting his clientele’s best interest truly sets him apart.

Outside of real estate, Slade enjoys creating music and has instrumental works featured in many popular TV shows. He has a wonderful family and is a lover of pets!

name: Tamara Williams
title: Sales Associate
bio_html: Born and raised in the Austin area, I bought my first house at just 18 years old, igniting a passion for real estate that has only grown over time. Pair that with over 25 years of experience in banking, I bring a wealth of financial expertise and personalized service to my clients, ensuring a smooth, informed home-buying or selling experience. Outside of real estate, I love traveling and spending time with family, friends, and my two rescue pups. I am always excited to help others find their perfect place to call home in this vibrant community.

name: Tami Corbitt
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Tami Corbitt is a 4th Generation Austinite who has witnessed the tremendous growth firsthand in Austin and the surrounding areas. Specializing in residential sales, new construction, relocation and investment property, she has been helping buyers and sellers since 1998. Tami prides herself in providing a high level of service and being available to her clients through constant communication from the beginning of a transaction through and beyond closing.

Education is important to Tami and she keeps up with current real estate issues, legal changes and real estate trends in the Austin real estate market, enabling her to better serve her clients. She evaluates their needs and loves helping her clients find the perfect home, and always puts her client’s needs first and foremost. Whether you are buying or selling, Tami will be there to advise you and make the process as easy as possible.

Tami enjoys spending time with Family and grandchildren, loves travel, design, cooking, gardening and shopping!
Prior to real estate, Tami worked for a large Austin Law Firm for many years, some of which included working for Real Estate Attorneys. She is a member of the National Association of Realtors, Texas Association of Realtors and Austin Board of Realtors.

name: Tangela Bailey
title: LUXURY SPECIALIST
bio_html:
Tangela is a Texas native who calls Austin home for the same reason so many others do… its rugged beauty, unique environment, and abundance of outdoor activities. With a background in entrepreneurship, Tangela realizes the importance of providing personal, reliable, and timely service to her clients. Whether it is helping realize a dream of ownership or selling one of their most important investments, she works hard to ensure the client is completely satisfied in both the short- and long-term.

Tangela networks extensively with realtors, lenders, and builders in order to stay current with market trends and offerings in Austin. Having worked in the title industry, Tangela has an in-depth knowledge of the real estate process from contract stage to final closing. While working with buyers brings her joy, she has also become adept at marketing and selling properties for investors and luxury homeowners.

Tangela celebrates 20 years as a full-time Realtor. She is a Graduate of the Real Estate Institute plus a member of the National Association of Realtors, the Texas Association of Realtors, the Austin Board of Realtors, the Houston Association of Realtors, and the Austin Luxury Network.

Email: [email protected]

name: Tanya Gripton Walker
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Tanya Taylor is a born and raised Texan with over a decade of real estate experience in the Austin area. Her in-depth understanding of the local market ensures that buyers and sellers receive personalized guidance tailored to their unique needs and preferences. When you choose to work with Tanya, you’re not just gaining a knowledgeable agent; you’re gaining a trusted advisor committed to your success. Experience the difference of working with a dedicated professional who values integrity, expertise, and client satisfaction.


Tanya’s reputation for excellence stems not only from her market expertise but also from her tireless work ethic. Known for her thorough nature, her attention to detail is unmatched, guaranteeing that her clients are well-informed and confident throughout the entire process. Whether she’s working with first-time homebuyers or seasoned investors, Tanya is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service. She takes the time to truly understand her clients’ goals, patiently guiding them through every step of their real estate journey.


After Tanya graduated from Baylor University with honors (Sic ‘Em Bears!), she moved to Austin to work at the Texas State Capitol and enjoyed a career in public service before becoming a full-time REALTOR®. Beyond her professional accomplishments, her passion for Austin extends into the community. Tanya has a brother with autism and supports initiatives for individuals with special needs. In her free time, she enjoys glamping, reading, cooking, spending time with family, and hiking with her dog.

name: Terri Michelle
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
With a keen mind and a servant’s heart, Terri has dedicated her life and career as a REALTOR® to serving her community. Her commitment to joyfully making a difference in the lives of others each day is reflected in both her professional and personal life. Terri has been involved in some type of volunteer activity since grade school! She has volunteered at local libraries, senior care facilities, churches and community groups such as CASA, PEO, the Georgetown Commission on Aging and an interfaith group of Jewish, Muslim, and Christian woman called Daughters of Abraham. Terri served in a variety of professional social services and health care roles before finding her true calling in real estate.

As a REALTOR®, Terri understands that buying or selling a home is a major financial and emotional decision in her clients’ lives. Her mission is to guide them through the process, avoid pitfalls, and serve as an advocate for their needs. Terri is always happy to share her in-depth market knowledge and experience with her clients and fellow agents. Having traveled all across the country and the world, she finds it easy to identify with people from all backgrounds. Terri’s clients consider her not only likable, but honest and trustworthy, and are eager to recommend her.

Terri Michelle, REALTOR®

Graduate, REALTOR® Institute (GRI) • Military Relocation Professional (MRP) • Pricing Strategy Advisor (PSA) • Real Estate Negotiation Expert (RENE) • Texas Affordable Housing Specialist-Divorce (RECS) • Accredited Buyer’s Representative (ABR®) • Seniors Real Estate Specialist® (SRES®) • Texas Residential Leasing Specialist (TRLS) 

Email: [email protected]

name: Terrie Sharpe
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Originally from Washington State, Terrie and her family made the move to Austin in 2003, where she quickly fell in love with the city’s dynamic energy, welcoming community, and vibrant culture. With years of experience in Program Management and 12 years growing her own business, Terrie developed a strong foundation in problem-solving, customer service, strong negotiation skills and an exceptional eye for detail—skills that seamlessly translate into her successful real estate career.  

Terrie’s dedication to real estate is driven by her passion for helping clients navigate the complexities of the home-buying process. Known for her straightforward approach, she brings honesty, clarity, and a lighthearted touch to every interaction. Working with first-time buyers is especially meaningful to her, as she enjoys guiding them through one of life’s most exciting and significant decisions. For Terrie, real estate is about more than just transactions—it’s an opportunity to build lasting trust, create meaningful connections, and create pathways for her clients to achieve their goals. 

Outside of her real estate work, Terrie values spending time with family and friends on the pickleball courts, playing tennis, traveling, and exploring the many activities Austin has to offer. She is also an active member of her community, deeply passionate about supporting local charities and contributing to global missions.

Email: [email protected]

name: Tracee Washington
title: SALES ASSOCIATE
bio_html:
Hello, I’m Tracee, your trusted Central Texas luxury land and home expert with over 15 years of real estate experience in the Austin area.

As an Air Force veteran and former Fortune 500 project manager, I combine discipline, business acumen, and market expertise to guide buyers and sellers through every stage of the real estate journey, turning homeownership dreams into reality.

I take the time to truly understand my clients’ needs, aspirations, and lifestyle goals. To me, finding the perfect property isn’t just about square footage or acreage, it’s about creating a space where dreams take root and memories flourish for generations.

When I’m not helping clients, you’ll find me traveling, painting, designing interiors, or tending to my garden.

Email: [email protected]

name: Valerie Elias
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Started in Real Estate 8 years ago—I initially started my business to create a legacy for my family. Growing up my brothers and I were not taught about the importance of owning your home, much less investing. I have 3 children of my own that I vowed to teach different. Becoming recognized as the example in my family, I’ve made it a priority to become educated, well informed, resourceful and be active in our own financial future. Thankfully, my husband shares this vision. He was not easy to find either 😉. Quickly, we came to realize how much we can help others as well as ourselves in this business. For us, it will always be important to share knowledge, be of service and give back where we can. My focus is to utilize my insight and skills to help you achieve YOUR goal—whether that is home ownership or creating solutions for savvy, tangible investments –short term and long term.  I enjoy working with people and I’m good with numbers so Real Estate made sense from the start and has been an enjoyable experience thus far. I am Native to Texas, I love the Austin area and where we live, and happy to serve the community.

I’ve found a great home here with Horizon Realty and the Martinez Team! No matter what you are looking for I am willing to work with you to find the perfect primary residence or your next solid investment! Feel free to contact me anytime, look forward to meeting you!

name: Vickie Boozer
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Vickie Boozer has enjoyed a successful career in residential real estate in Texas since 1996. She has over 250 happy clients, and has represented more than 30 of those clients in multiple transactions. She is dedicated to providing first class service to all of her clients. Approximately 95% of her business comes from repeat clients and personal referrals. Vickie works with buyers and sellers with all levels of experience, from first-time home buyers and sellers to the savviest investor. She especially enjoys working all over Austin and surrounding areas, and has a wide range of market knowledge to assist her clients in finding the ideal location.

Vickie has a background in technology development, and she enjoys bringing that knowledge to her real estate business, using the latest technologies to be more efficient and save time for herself and her clients.

Vickie is a Certified Residential Specialist (CRS), being one of only 3% of all Realtors® nationwide holding this credential. She is also an Accredited Buyer Representative (ABR), a Graduate of the Real Estate Institute (GRI), and an e-PRO technology professional. She is a member of the Austin Board of Realtors®, the Texas Association of Realtors®, the National Association of Realtors®, the Real Estate Buyer’s Agency Council, and the Council of Residential Specialists.

In her spare time Vickie enjoys spending time with her husband of 30 years, her daughter Allison, and her English Springer Spaniel, Jean-Luc. She also manages a personal vacation rental property on the Gulf coast of Alabama. She loves Austin, the beautiful Texas Hill Country, and the Highland Lakes, and spends as much time as possible seeing the sites around Austin, especially all of the great Austin music venues. She is an avid music fan and loves going to concerts, and also enjoys travel, cooking, gardening and Yoga.

name: Yahaira Martinez
title: Sales Associate
bio_html:
Yahaira was born in Illinois. Yahaira moved to Texas, at a very young age, where she eventually met a young gentleman which she married and then moved to Nevada, there they had 2 beautiful children. Being that she spent almost all of her childhood in Texas, Yahaira is thrilled to be back and especially in Austin.

Yahaira started her professional career as a Mortgage Originator and after working with many wonderful Realtors she decided to peruse her new career in Real Estate. Yahaira has been in the industry for over 14 years and she understands the emotions and excitement of selling and buying a home. Yahaira knows that it’s more than just four walls, floors and a ceiling, it’s a place where memories are made and joys are shared. It’s a place called home.

name: Yolla Bsaibes
title: Sales Associate
bio_html: I have lived and worked in Austin since 1993. I earned my real estate license in 2003 and joined Horizon Realty in 2010. I earned the recognized Graduate Realtor Institute (GRI) designation in 2006, the e-PRO (ePRO) Technology Certification in 2008, the Certified Negotiation Expert (CNE) and the Accredited Staging Professional (ASP) Certification in 2012, to better serve my clients’ needs. I have enjoyed a successful career and earned several certificates of excellence and awards. I have worked with a wide variety of clients from first time buyers, to move-up buyers, to investors. My knowledge of the real estate market, my negotiating skills and my ability to listen to my clients’ needs and desires have kept me ahead of my competition. My customers and clients stay loyal and refer friends and family to me because they know I will always do whatever it takes to make sure everything goes smoothly from beginning to end.
